homePage.whatOurCustomersAreSayingAboutOurSolarSa: <sp>What Our Customers Are Saying</sp> About Our Solar Sales Software
homePage.whatMakesUsUniqueDescription: We combine deep industry knowledge with cutting-edge AI to deliver a tool that truly understands and solves real solar sales challenges. Here's what sets us apart from the rest:
homePage.unique1Text: Years of hands-on experience in solar design and installation shape our tech. We speak kilowatts, pitch angles, and PV optimization fluently.
homePage.unique2Text: We’ve worked side-by-side with solar sales teams. We know the bottlenecks, the follow-up stress, and the race to send polished proposals fast.
homePage.unique3Text: Most tools still need human tweaking. Ours doesn’t. From roof to layout, every panel is placed by AI in the most efficient way - no guessing, no dragging, just results.
homePage.unique4Title: Smarter AI Trained on Real AutoCAD Blueprints
homePage.unique4Text: Our AI is trained on tens of thousands of real CAD project files, giving it engineer-level insight into roof layouts, shading, and solar constraints - mirroring the vision of a real solar engineer.
homePage.unique4AiText: Powered by our <bold>Patent-Pending</bold>, in-house AI engine. SolarGenix sets a new industry standard for smarter, faster, precise and more reliable solar solutions.
homePage.seeWhatYourProposalWillLookLike: See What Your Proposal Will Look Like
homePage.seeWhatYourProposalWillLookLikeDescripti: All the insights, calculations and design decisions come together in a clean, modern proposal that’s built to win trust. Designed for clarity and visual appeal, each solar sales proposal makes it easy for homeowners to understand their system, savings and investment.
homePage.seeWhatYourProposalWillLookLikePoint3: Clear breakdown of savings, system details & ROI
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftware: Why Solar Teams Love Our Sales Software
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareTitle1: Send Proposals While the Lead Is Still Warm
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareDescrip: No more waiting hours or days to send a quote. Your team can go from roof scan to final proposal in minutes. That means you reply while the customer is still excited, which makes it much easier to win the job.
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareTitle2: Accurate Designs Your Team Can Trust
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareDescrip: AI-powered roof detection, shading checks, and panel layout give your team solid numbers to work with. They can walk homeowners through system size, savings, and payback with confidence, without doing everything in spreadsheets.
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareTitle3: Cut the Busywork Out of Solar Sales
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareDescrip: Your reps shouldn’t be stuck redrawing systems or editing PDFs all day. With automated designs and ready-made proposal templates, they create once, adjust quickly, and send. Less admin time means more calls, more follow-ups, and more closed projects.
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareTitle4: Simple Enough for New Hires, Strong Enough for Pros
homePage.whySolarTeamsLoveOurSalesSoftwareDescrip: New team members can pick it up quickly, and experienced reps get the depth they need. Everyone follows the same process, uses the same proposal format, and sees the same data, which keeps your sales and ops teams on the same page.
homePage.faqSubtitle: Optimize your solar design workflow with our AI-powered tools. Create accurate quotes and proposals in seconds, save time, and improve efficiency.
homePage.bottomCallToActionTitle: Sell Solar Faster, Smarter, Better with SolarGenix
homePage.forbsTitle: Software is now central to solar success adapt or be left behind.

roofDetection.heroTitle:
<sp>AI Roof Detection</sp> 
 Accurate Layout and Solar Sales Proposal
roofDetection.heroDescription: Upgrade your solar sales process with AI-powered roof detection that provides quick, accurate details about roof layout and obstructions. Generate professional, ready-to-sign solar proposals in just seconds.
roofDetection.whyYouNeedAIPoweredRoofDetectionTitle: Why You Need AI-Powered Roof Detection To Create Solar Sales Proposal
roofDetection.autoDetectRoofDimensionsTitle: Auto-detect Roof Dimensions for Any Home
roofDetection.autoDetectRoofDimensionsDescription: With our automated roof detection technology, you can quickly generate accurate roof layout in seconds. Our AI analyzes aerial imagery, calculates dimensions, and maps angles. This allows you to skip site visits, avoid waiting for engineering reviews, and move straight from lead to proposal without delays.
roofDetection.analyzePitchOrientationTitle: Analyze Pitch and Orientation for Sun-Facing Accuracy
roofDetection.analyzePitchOrientationDescription: Our pitch and orientation analysis automatically determines the precise sun exposure for each roof section. AI assesses angles, directions, and shade patterns to identify the optimal panel placement. You receive reliable energy forecasts and properly sized system recommendations in seconds, to make sure every quote is backed by data.
roofDetection.identifyObstaclesResidentialTitle: Identify Obstructions on Any Residential Roof
roofDetection.identifyObstaclesResidentialDescription: Our automatic obstruction detection considers every chimney, vent, and rooftop feature in proposals. AI quickly spots potential shading sources or installation challenges. So you can design around them from the start. This way, there are no surprises during installation, just precise layouts that work on the first try.
roofDetection.faqDescription: Optimize your solar design workflow with our AI-powered tools. Create accurate quotes and proposals in seconds, save time, and improve efficiency.
roofDetection.bottomCtaTitle: Create Professional Solar Sales Proposal with SolarGenix
roofDetection.whyRoofDetectionTitle: Why You need Automatic Roof Detection?

point1.title: Create Accurate Sales Proposals in Seconds
point1.description: By automating roof detection, you can generate accurate solar proposals in seconds and reply to leads while they’re still hot. This shortens your sales cycle, keeps prospects engaged, and gives you more opportunities to win the deal first.

point2.title: Accurate Roof Modeling to Improve System Design
point2.description: With Our AI-powered roof modeling you get detailed measurements of roof geometry, pitch, and orientation. This level of accuracy helps you design systems that maximize production while reducing errors and redesigns

point3.title: Boost Homeowner Confidence
point3.description: Accurate visual modeling gives homeowners a clear understanding of their future system. Detailed roof layouts, realistic module placement, and precise shading help reduce confusion and skepticism, resulting in a smoother approval process.

point4.title: Reduces Labor Costs
point4.description: Reduce labor costs by cutting down the resources needed for every project. Our AI-powered roof detection handles the measurements and design groundwork. Now you spend less time on manual tasks, rely less on engineering support, and can take on more projects without increasing headcount.

intelligentFinancialForecasting.title: Intelligent Financial Forecasting
intelligentFinancialForecasting.description: Present compelling savings and ROI numbers that make it easy for homeowners to say “yes.”

financialForecasting.heroTitle: <sp>Intelligent Financial Forecasting</sp> That Helps Homeowners See Their Savings
financialForecasting.heroDescription: No spreadsheets, no guesswork. Our AI builds clear, compelling financial forecasts tailored to each home and utility rate. Provide homeowners with proposals that include a personalized savings story backed by real numbers.
financialForecasting.whatMakesIntelligentFinancialForecasting: What Makes Intelligent Financial Forecasting Essential for Solar Sales Proposals
financialForecasting.savingsEstimatesWithLocalEnergyRates: Savings estimates with local energy rates
financialForecasting.savingsEstimatesWithLocalEnergyRatesDesc: Our AI-powered savings engine calculates precise cost savings by analyzing local utility rates and tariffs. It examines local energy prices and consumption patterns to deliver realistic, location-specific savings estimates in seconds.
financialForecasting.rOIPaybackPeriod: ROI and payback period based on homeowner usage
financialForecasting.rOIPaybackPeriodDescription: Our intelligent financial model assesses homeowner energy use to determine exact return on investment and payback timelines. It considers system size, usage patterns, and estimated production to provide clear financial results.
financialForecasting.localIncentivesRebatesAppliedAutomatical: Local incentives and rebates applied automatically

Our system automatically finds and applies eligible local incentives, rebates, and tax credits. It stays updated on regional programs to ensure each financial projection shows the maximum benefits available.
financialForecasting.whyFinancialForecastingTitle: Why You Need Intelligent Financial Forecasting

point1.title: Increase Proposal Accuracy
point1.description: Our AI-powered financial forecasting guarantees accurate savings, ROI, and payback estimates. Automated analysis minimizes guesswork and errors, helping you deliver dependable, data-driven proposals every time.

point2.title: Close More Deals Faster
point2.description: Instant financial projections keep prospects engaged and confident. Clear savings estimates and ROI insights help homeowners make decisions quickly, shortening sales cycles and increasing conversion rates.

point3.title: Reduce Manual Effort
point3.description: Our intelligent automation replaces spreadsheets and manual calculations. Local rates, incentives, and usage data are applied automatically, so you can focus on selling instead of crunching numbers.

point4.title: Build Customer Trust
point4.description: Transparent, customized financial forecasts boost homeowners' confidence in their investments. Precise projections and well-defined incentives showcase professionalism and credibility in the proposal.

panelPlacement.heroTitle: <sp>AI-Driven Panel Placement</sp> to Maximize Solar Layout Efficiency
panelPlacement.heroDescription: Optimize system performance with AI-powered panel placement. Our technology creates solar panel layouts that maximize energy output and provide sales-ready proposals in a few seconds.
panelPlacement.whatMakesPanelPlacementEssentialTitle: What Makes AI-Optimized Panel Placement Essential for Solar Sales Proposals
panelPlacement.automatedPanelPositioningDescription: Our AI-optimized panel placement automatically finds the best spots for solar panels on any roof. It analyzes roof shape, sunlight exposure, and obstructions to create optimized layouts in seconds.
panelPlacement.avoidsShadedInefficientAreas: Avoids Shaded and Inefficient Areas With Data-Backed Logic
panelPlacement.avoidsShadedInefficientAreasDescription: The system detects shaded or low-performing areas and skips them when positioning panels. Using advanced algorithms and solar performance data, it guarantees that each panel operates at its maximum energy output.
panelPlacement.maximizesEnergyProduction: Maximizes Energy Production per Roof with Precision Spacing
panelPlacement.maximizesEnergyProductionDescription: Our AI technology calculates the best panel spacing to maximize sunlight capture while maintaining efficiency. AI instantly produces energy-maximizing layouts across the entire roof.
panelPlacement.whyPanelPlacementTitle: Why You Need AI-Optimized Panel Placement

point1.title: Speed Up Your Workflow
point1.description: Our AI technology analyzes the roof and automatically generates accurate roof layouts. It eliminates manual work, lets you create an efficient panel placement layout in seconds, and keeps proposals moving without delays.

point2.title: Maximize System Performance
point2.description: AI analyzes roof azimuth and places panels on the most sun-exposed roof facets. Combined with proper panel spacing, it maximizes energy production and efficient system performance.

point3.title: Boost Productivity
point3.description: Our AI automatically detects roof tilt (slope). No more manual measurements or site visits. You get precise calculations for each prospect in seconds, which allows you to have optimal panel placement with greater confidence.

point4.title: Close More Deals
point4.description: Our panel placement applies state-specific fire setback rules, providing you with a clear and well-structured layout. It instills confidence in homeowners about your designs. Data-driven proposals facilitate quicker client approvals, speeding up your sales process.

shadingAnalysis.heroTitle: <sp>AI-Powered Shading</sp> Analysis Based on Real Sun Movement for Accurate Sales Proposals
shadingAnalysis.heroDescription: Boost your workflow with AI shading analysis that instantly reveals sun exposure and shading risks. Create professional, data-driven sales proposals in seconds.
shadingAnalysis.whatMakesShadingAnalysisEssentialTitle: <sp>Why Advanced Shading Analysis Is</sp> Essential for Solar Sales Proposals
shadingAnalysis.dynamicShadingMaps: Dynamic Shading Maps Based on Sun Movement
shadingAnalysis.dynamicShadingMapsDescription: Our dynamic shading map technology lets you see how sun interacts with a property throughout the day and across seasons. AI tracks sun movement and produces accurate shadow projections in seconds.
shadingAnalysis.shadingAnalysisTrees: Shading Analysis from Trees, Neighboring Homes, and Roof Features
shadingAnalysis.shadingAnalysisTreesDescription: Our advanced shading analysis helps identify trees, neighboring homes, and roof features that may impact system performance. Using AI-powered aerial imagery analysis, we detect shading obstructions and accurately measure their height and proximity within seconds.
shadingAnalysis.exposureScoringFind: Exposure Scoring to Find High-Performance Panel Zones
shadingAnalysis.exposureScoringFindDescription: Our exposure scoring technology identifies the best zones for panel placement. AI analyzes sunlight duration, shading patterns, and roof shape to deliver precise performance scores in seconds. This optimizes system efficiency and designs layouts that maximize energy output.
shadingAnalysis.whyShadingAnalysisTitle: Why You Need AI-Powered Shading Analysis

point1.title: Maximize Energy Output
point1.description: Use accurate sun-path modeling to position panels to maximize energy generation. By identifying high-performing zones and minimizing shadow losses, the solar system is optimized for maximum energy production year-round.

point2.title: Close More Deals With Data-Driven Shading Analysis
point2.description: When you present a solar sales proposal supported by accurate shading analysis, homeowners see that your design is optimized and reliable. This strengthens credibility, reduces objections, and increases your close rate.

point3.title: Create Accurate Shading Analysis in Seconds
point3.description: Skip manual measurements and site visits. AI instantly simulates sun movement, evaluates obstructions, and creates detailed shading maps in just seconds. It gives you reliable shading analyses for every residential roof.

point4.title: Scale Your Operations Without Adding Staff
point4.description: By automating complex shading assessments, you can handle more projects with the same workforce. Reduce dependency on engineering resources, speed up proposal creation, and grow your business efficiently.

obstructionDetection.heroTitle: <sp>AI-Powered Obstruction Detection</sp> for Perfect Panel Placement
obstructionDetection.heroDescription: Our AI-powered obstruction detection identifies roof challenges such as vents, chimneys, or fire setbacks, and helps you plan the perfect placement for solar panels. By automating this process, you can offer super-accurate proposals to homeowners, save time, and increase your closing rate.
obstructionDetection.whatMakesAIPoweredObstacleDetectionEssen: What Makes AI-Powered Obstruction Detection Essential for Solar Sales Proposals
obstructionDetection.detectFireSetbacks: Detect fire setbacks with AI precision
obstructionDetection.detectFireSetbacksDescription: Our AI-powered obstruction detection identifies fire setbacks based on the roof’s layout, ensuring your proposal avoids placing panels in hazardous areas. This ensures fire safety compliance with local fire safety regulations and suggests efficient solar panel placement.
obstructionDetection.smartDetectionChimneysVents: Smart detection of chimneys and vents
obstructionDetection.smartDetectionChimneysVentsDescription: Chimneys and roof vents can block sunlight or create inefficient angles. Our AI scans the roof to detect these obstructions, creating a precise map that avoids impacted areas, helping you design a more efficient and space-maximized solar system.
obstructionDetection.spotSkylightsAutomatically: Spot skylights and other roof features automatically
obstructionDetection.spotSkylightsAutomaticallyDescription: Skylights, air conditioning units, and other rooftop structures can prevent you from using valuable space for solar panels. Our system detects these obstructions and plans around them, ensuring your solar proposals are accurate and efficient.
obstructionDetection.whyObstructionDetectionTitle: Why You Need AI-Powered Obstruction Detection

point1.title: Increase Proposal Accuracy
point1.description: By scanning the roof's layout and automatically detecting obstructions like chimneys, vents, and skylights, the system ensures that no critical factors are overlooked. This helps you create a more reliable proposal, reduces errors, and improves the quality of your client presentations.

point2.title: Speed Up Your Proposal Process
point2.description: Instead of manually assessing each roof, the AI quickly identifies and maps out potential obstructions. This accelerates the proposal creation process and allows sales reps to handle more leads and focus on closing deals.

point3.title: Boost Your Team’s Efficiency
point3.description: AI handles the technical analysis of the roof, allowing sales reps to build proposals in seconds and discuss options with clients. This reduces the back-and-forth between team members and allows the team operate more efficiently and deliver proposals in less time.

point4.title: Improve System Efficiency
point4.description: The AI identifies areas with obstructions and calculates the best places to install solar panels. By ensuring panels are placed in optimal positions, sales reps can offer clients more energy-efficient systems and better returns on investment.

panelPlacement.imgText: This final step connects all the data - roof layout, shading, and performance prediction to deliver a smart, sales-ready design without touching a layout tool.

conversionRate.description: Because homeowners receive clear, personalised solar information instantly, they stay engaged and move forward faster. This reduces drop-off, boosts trust, and significantly increases the percentage of leads who book a consultation or site survey.

shorterSalesCycle.title: A Shorter, Streamlined Solar Sales Cycle
shorterSalesCycle.description: Automated instant quoting removes the days-long delays common in traditional solar sales. With faster responses and verified leads, you dramatically compress the time from initial interest to scheduled appointment, helping you close more installs each month.

timeUse.description: With only real, verified leads entering the pipeline, your team no longer wastes hours contacting fake submissions, chasing invalid emails, or manually qualifying low-intent prospects. This increases productivity and lets reps focus on high-value conversations that close faster.

It instantly models the roof’s shape, slope, and structure. Additionally, our roof detection identifies obstacles like chimneys and pipes.

It provides a personalized savings narrative supported by real data, including savings estimates, ROI, and payback periods based on the homeowner’s actual usage.

panelPlacement.title: AI-Optimized Panel Placement
panelPlacement.description: Our software automatically places panels on each roof in the most effective pattern for sunlight, spacing, and aesthetic fit. It uses advanced AI to avoid shaded or inefficient areas and maximize production per roof.
